## Visual evidence

<!-- For player-visible changes, add before/after screenshots or a short recording. Check desktop and a phone-sized viewport. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run gate` passes.
- [ ] New or changed behavior has decisive automated coverage.
- [ ] Player-visible changes were checked on desktop and mobile.
- [ ] Both strategic render paths were considered when map rendering changed.
- [ ] Gameplay rules remain host-agnostic and deterministic.
- [ ] No secrets, generated output, or unrelated changes are included.

Commit messages and PR titles should use scoped Conventional Commits, for example `feat(map): add sparse movement overlays`.
